name: parallaxpro-engine
description: Shared dependency root for the ParallaxPro engine. Declared here so Node's module resolution (which walks up from frontend/runtime/function/physics/ looking for @dimforge/rapier3d-compat) finds the WASM physics binding when the engine is loaded headless from engine/backend or engine/headless. The frontend editor ships its own copy inside engine/frontend/editor for vite bundling — do not remove that.
